flags.summary: In-state tuition at Doane University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.9k → $44.0k).

flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Doane University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.9k → $44.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Doane University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 978).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Doane University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
